hero.headline: I build systems that scale.
hero.bio: Senior Full Stack Developer with 5+ years building SaaS, APIs and distributed architectures.

about.title: About me
about.bio: Senior Full Stack Developer with experience in high-concurrency systems, critical migrations and optimizations that made a real difference. Reduced response times by 60%, optimized queries by 70% and cut incident resolution time by 40%.

sections.cta_title: Got a project? I'll make it happen.
sections.cta_text: I didn't wait for the perfect moment to start my career — and I won't wait to deliver results on your project. If you need someone who actually gets things done, let's talk.

footer.bio: Senior Full Stack Developer building scalable systems and digital experiences that make a difference.
